headline: Harry Wilson
body: 🚨 EXCL: Leeds United reach agreement to sign Harry Wilson as free agent. 29yo winger targeted by many clubs amid expiring FFC contract but LUFC win race - Wales int’l to do medical in due course & join on long-term deal with higher salary TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7263255… Link Leeds agree deal to sign Harry Wilson as free agent Leeds attempted to sign the Wales international last year but a deal collapsed on deadline day. nytimes.com
raw_text:
🚨 EXCL: Leeds United reach agreement to sign Harry Wilson as free agent. 29yo winger targeted by many clubs amid expiring #FFC contract but #LUFC win race - Wales int’l to do medical in due course & join on long-term deal with higher salary @TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7263255…

Link



Leeds agree deal to sign Harry Wilson as free agent

Leeds attempted to sign the Wales international last year but a deal collapsed on deadline day.
nytimes.com
